heading: Organization and Project Limits
body:
| Component                                                                    | Limit                                                                                                                                                               |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Database Users per Atlas Project                                             | 100                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Atlas Users per Atlas Project                                                | 500                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Atlas Users per Atlas Organization                                           | 500                                                                                                                                                                 |
| API Keys per Atlas Organization                                              | 500                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Access List Entries per Atlas Project                                        | 200                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Users per Atlas Team                                                         | 250                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Teams per Atlas Project                                                      | 100                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Teams per Atlas Organization                                                 | 250                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Teams per Atlas User                                                         | 100                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Organizations per Atlas User                                                 | 250                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Linked Organizations per Atlas Paying Organization                           | 250                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Clusters per Atlas Project                                                   | 25                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Projects per Atlas User                                                      | 250                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Projects per Atlas Organization                                              | 250                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Custom MongoDB roles per Atlas Project                                       | 100                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Assigned Roles per Database User                                             | 100                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Federated database instances per Atlas Project                               | 25                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Total Network Peering Connections per Atlas Project                          | 50Atlas limits the number of nodes per Network Peering connection based on the CIDR (Classless Inter-Domain Routing) block and the region selected for the project. |
| Pending Network Peering Connections per Atlas Project                        | 25                                                                                                                                                                  |
| AWS PrivateLink Addressable Target Nodes per Region                          | 50                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Azure Private Link Addressable Target Nodes per Region                       | 150                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Google Cloud GCP Private Service Connect Addressable Target Nodes per Region | 50                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Global Cluster shard keys per Atlas Project                                  | 40                                                                                                                                                                  |

> **Note:** **Addressable Target Nodes** refer to the maximum number of MongoDB nodes
> that can be accessed through private endpoints per project, per region.
> Target nodes include mongod instances in replica sets, mongos instances
> in sharded clusters, and BI Connector for Atlas instances across all dedicated clusters in
> the project.

star You can deploy only one Free cluster (formerly known as `M0`) per
project. However, if you have sales contracts with MongoDB, you might
be able to deploy more Free clusters per project. To learn more,
contact a MongoDB sales representative.
